name: Modesto'S First
description_short: Modesto's First FCU is a member-owned credit union serving Northern California with hometown banking services, offering savings accounts, loans, and digital banking tools.
description_long:
Modesto's First Federal Credit Union is a not-for-profit, member-owned financial institution serving the Northern California community. The credit union emphasizes personal, hometown service and has positioned itself as a community-focused alternative to traditional banks. Their website highlights their commitment to member relationships and local banking.

The institution offers a range of standard credit union products including share accounts (savings), share draft accounts (checking), vehicle loans, and other consumer loan products. They provide digital banking conveniences such as online banking, mobile deposit capabilities, direct deposit services, and payroll deduction options (particularly for City of Modesto employees). Their routing number is 321173506, and they maintain at least one physical branch location where members can conduct in-person business.

Modesto's First differentiates itself through localized service offerings, including a payroll deduction program specific to City of Modesto employees and an emphasis on "hometown service with heart." They offer a 0.25% discount on new and used vehicle loans for borrowers making 20% cash down payments, with a separate first-time buyer program. Membership requires a minimum $5 opening deposit. Their mobile deposit service is free to qualifying members with defined limits ($3,000 per check, $5,000 daily, $10,000 monthly).

As a credit union, this institution is NCUA-insured rather than FDIC-insured, which provides equivalent deposit protection. The available website content is limited to member services and general information, lacking details about specific account types, interest rates, fees, loan terms, or the full scope of available products. Prospective members would need to contact the institution directly or visit in person for comprehensive product details and pricing information.
services: Vehicle loans (new and used) with down payment discount options
Online banking portal with login credentials
Mobile app banking with mobile deposit functionality
Direct deposit for payroll, Social Security, and government checks
Payroll deduction services (City of Modesto employees)
Member services support via phone and in-person branch visits
Calculators for loan and financial planning
Forms for membership applications and loan applications
pros: Free mobile deposit service for qualifying members with straightforward instructions and process
Direct deposit and payroll deduction options available, including dedicated payroll deduction program for City of Modesto employees
0.25% discount on new and used vehicle loans with 20% cash down payment
Member-owned credit union structure means profits potentially return to members rather than external shareholders
NCUA insurance protection on deposits equivalent to FDIC coverage
Low membership barrier with only $5 minimum opening deposit required
Dedicated member services phone line (888-945-2020) for assistance and service requests
cons: Mobile deposit has restrictive limits ($3,000 per check, $5,000 daily, $10,000 monthly) that may not accommodate larger deposits
Limited online presence and publicly available information about specific products, rates, and fees
Account eligibility restrictions on mobile deposit exclude second chance checking, trust, and representative payee accounts
Mobile deposit requires 3-month account tenure and good standing status before access is granted
No visible information about loan approval timelines, rates, or complete product offerings on public website
best_for: Northern California residents and employees seeking local, relationship-based banking with community connection
City of Modesto employees interested in payroll deduction and direct deposit integration
Vehicle buyers looking for discounted loan rates with down payment incentives
Members who prefer mobile banking convenience and want to avoid branch visits for routine deposits
diagnosis: Modesto's First FCU is best for Northern California residents who value personalized, community-focused banking and want to support a member-owned institution. The main caveat is that critical product details including specific account types, interest rates, loan terms, and comprehensive fee structures are not publicly available on their website, requiring direct contact with the credit union for detailed financial planning.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Modesto's First — Credit Union in MODESTO, CA | CreditDoc
meta_description: Modesto's First — NCUA-insured credit union in MODESTO, CA. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
